title: Why does Pen Pen exist anyway
display_title: Why does Pen Pen exist anyway
wikitext:
[]: Why does Pen Pen exist anyway ?             Quote Post by Sheena » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:14 pm I know this might sound stupid- but everything in Evangelion seems to have a certain meaning, even all supporting characters are there for a certain reason. But… why is Pen Pen there…? Is he really just a comical relief character? What do you think? Maybe he is there to show that Misato can't be alone… Or maybe he is there to motivate Shinji into batteling angels, since it's their fault that epic beings like Pen Pen became rare

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:20 pm He helps lighten the mood.

[]: Re: Why does Pen Pen exist anyway ?             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:32 pm Sheena wrote: Maybe he is there to show that Misato can't be alone…

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:51 pm Pen-Pen's there because Sadamoto. Blame him.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:54 pm Why does Pen Pen Exist Anyways..?

[]:             Quote Post by Sheena » Thu Mar 10, 2011 9:56 pm That's right. I rather wonder if we'll see any more of him in Rebuild - he got packed off with Touji and company, right?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Mar 10, 2011 10:22 pm Comic relief, a foil for Misato, to show Misato's desperation after Kaji's death, and because his love for Shinji is definitely canon. I refuse to believe otherwise.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Thu Mar 10, 2011 10:36 pm Aside from comic relief, chances are because he's one of the very few penguins left in the world after Second Impact. All(?) species of penguin exist south of the equator, and they're commonly found in Anarctica. After 2I, there would be next to none of them left (even moreso than other families of species). Perhaps Misato took him in for sentimental reasons: to remind her of what she saw in Anarctica, to remind herself that not everything was lost that day, or something related to that. That theory kinda disagrees with her reasoning for not visiting the conservation centre (or whatever it's called) in 2.22, but she's always had Pen-Pen regardless.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Mar 10, 2011 11:07 pm comic relief, and for an opportunity to see Shinji and Asuka run out of the bathroom naked

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Mar 11, 2011 10:05 am

[]:             Quote Post by Strayn » Fri Mar 11, 2011 10:29 am Fazmotron wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Mar 11, 2011 11:20 am @Faz: That image macro is sure to go into history somewhere . Pen-Pen was brought in because the Gainax staff thought that they needed a mascot. They initially considered a monkey, but they weren't happy with that at all, but then thought "Hey, Hakone has hot springs, so why not bring in the animal least suited to hot springs?" Sadamoto created a "Hot spring penguin", and as a result, Pen-Pen came into being.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Mar 11, 2011 1:31 pm Sheena, you are treading dangerously close to approaching the great secret of Evangelion here. I suggest you take a few steps backwards before your perception of the universe is permanently shattered through the cracking of this code. EGF agents are en route and will meet with you in several hours to ease the transition into pudding.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Mar 11, 2011 1:53 pm Well, Misato doesn't want to get lonely! (better than using Kaji... just sayin') http://oi53.tinypic.com/2uel2kz.jpg That's right, show that jack-ass who's the better boss of this show.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Mar 11, 2011 8:50 pm UrsusArctos wrote: @Faz: That image macro is sure to go into history somewhere .

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Mar 12, 2011 12:39 am Pen Pen exists because he is awesome. He needs no other reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Sat Mar 12, 2011 12:43 am Bagheera wrote: Pen Pen exists because he is awesome. He needs no other reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Sat Mar 12, 2011 12:44 am The real question is, why does Pen Pen turn up in EoE during the fight between Shinji and Asuka? And why didn't we get to see Pen Pen get tanged?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Mar 12, 2011 12:49 am Jessemon wrote: The real question is, why does Pen Pen turn up in EoE during the fight between Shinji and Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Mar 12, 2011 11:16 am the "Pen Pen is God theory" trust me *Indiana Jones smirk*

But… why is Pen Pen there…? Is he really just a comical relief character? What do you think? Maybe he is there to show that Misato can't be alone… Or maybe he is there to motivate Shinji
